description: Wasm exported-global type lifetime bug - literal global initialization and subtyping could leave an exported global pointing at a TypeDef/RecGroup that was later freed. The fix spans js/src/wasm/WasmInitExpr.cpp, WasmInstance.cpp, WasmJS.cpp/WasmJS.h, WasmModule.cpp, and WasmValue.h, cleaning up global initialization so declared types and initialized values keep the correct recursion group alive. ASAN reports heap-use-after-free in TypeDef::recGroup; if the freed type memory is reused, a later import can treat the global as an incompatible wasm type, creating a type-confusion primitive.

fixes.description: Bug 1884887 - wasm: Cleanup global initialization logic.
